base_version.description: Latest version you are editing from. Used for optimistic concurrency checks.

edits.description: List of find/replace operations to apply to the current prompt version. Each edit's 'old' text must match exactly once. Edits are applied sequentially. Mutually exclusive with prompt.

old.description: Text to find in the current prompt. Must match exactly once.

prompt.description: Full prompt payload to publish as a new version. Mutually exclusive with edits.
